## Description

Please provide a clear and concise summary of the changes introduced by this Pull Request.

- What problem does this PR solve?
- What is the technical implementation detail?
- Are there any breaking changes?

## Related Issue

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Optimization / Code cleanup

## Testing and Verification

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:
- [ ] All stack compile checks pass locally (`make build-all-stacks`)
- [ ] App-specific unit tests run and pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Verified routing, port configurations, or environment setups

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or API keys are committed in this PR.
- [ ] Changes do not expose unnecessary ports or bypass local network constraints.
- [ ] Commit is GPG signed.

## Screenshots or Logs (if applicable)

Please attach screenshots or terminal logs that demonstrate the behavior of this change.
